title: Full-Stack AI Engineer (Prompt Engineering & Agentic Systems) Python, Azure
company_focus:
Cybersecurity IAM, exposure management, and MDR augmented by
AI
description:
We help the world Be Everyday Ready™

Today’s threatscape is relentless. So are we. At Cyderes, we
specialize in building practical IAM, exposure management,
and risk programs, and stopping active threats fast with MDR
that works with your existing security tools — all augmented
by AI and driven by seasoned operators. Our tireless global
team is laser-focused on cybersecurity, arming organizations
with the people, platforms, and perspectives they need to
conquer whatever tomorrow throws their way.

Role Summary

We are hiring a Full-Stack AI Engineer to design, build, and
operate production-grade agentic AI systems. The role
focuses on prompt engineering, PromptOps, Python backend
services, Azure-native cloud architecture, and full-stack
delivery of reliable AI workflows at scale.

Responsibilities

- Design, test, and optimize enterprise-grade prompts, system
  instructions, schemas, and agent workflows.
- Build multi-step agentic pipelines, self-refining loops, and
  deterministic fallback logic.
- Implement PromptOps: versioning, evaluations, regression
  testing, hallucination mitigation, token optimization, and
  governance.
- Build RAG pipelines, vector search, memory layers, and
  grounding strategies.
- Build and maintain Python-based microservices (FastAPI,
  async patterns, REST APIs).
- Deliver full-stack AI applications (React, TypeScript) used
  by analysts for multi-turn AI interactions.
- Manage GitHub, CI/CD, testing, branching, and release
  automation.
- Integrate AI services via serverless, containerized, and
  event-driven architectures.
- Deploy AI workloads on Azure App Services, Functions, AKS,
  Logic Apps, Event Grid.
- Implement IaC using Azure Bicep / ARM.
- Enforce security, RBAC, Key Vault, secrets management, and
  runtime policies.
- Optimize cost, performance, observability, and reliability.
- Build and maintain embeddings, feature pipelines, telemetry,
  and drift detection.
- Perform data analysis and experimentation using KQL and
  Splunk SPL.
- Support model selection, fine-tuning strategies, safety
  constraints, and evaluation frameworks.
- Translate ambiguous business needs into measurable AI
  workflows.
- Partner with security, engineering, and product teams.
- Produce clear documentation (architecture, prompts,
  runbooks).
- Act as an internal SME for agentic systems and modern AI
  development patterns.

Required Skills

- Advanced prompt engineering (Gemini, GPT, Claude; multi-
  model systems).
- Strong Python, FastAPI, async programming.
- Deep experience with Azure cloud services and serverless
  patterns.
- Hands-on RAG and vector databases (Azure Search, Pinecone,
  FAISS, etc.).
- Agent frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, or
  custom).
- Frontend experience with React + TypeScript.
- Strong CI/CD, GitHub Actions, and DevOps practices.
- Multi-agent or autonomous systems experience.
- AI in security operations or automation.
- Azure / ML Ops certifications.
- SOC2 / ISO / AI governance exposure.
- Open-source or AI tooling contributions.

Cyderes is an Equal Opportunity Employer (EOE). Qualified
applicants are considered for employment without regard to
race, religion, color, sex, age, disability, sexual
orientation, genetic information, national origin, or
veteran status.

Note: This job posting is intended for direct applicants
only. We request that outside recruiters do not contact us
regarding this position.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is hands-on AI engineering focused on building,
deploying, and optimizing agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines,
and multi-agent workflows. The engineer works directly with
prompt engineering, agent frameworks, model fine-tuning, and
AI service integration rather than just supporting
infrastructure.
